A material used in tailoring clothes and cultivating synthetics.

Source: Cut from all Plains of Eidolon Fish via Fisher Hai-Luk in Cetus (Earth).

patchlogs.name: Derelict Shift: Update 28.3.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed some two-handed Melee weapons (i.e. Hammer Zaw (Rabvee), Heavy Blade Zaw (Dokrahm), Kuva Shildeg) sticking to your hand no matter what you’re doing.

patchlogs.name: Beasts of the Sanctuary: Update 22.20.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed being unable to Chat link Dokrahm, Rabvee or Sephfan Zaws.
